shellCommands.command: pwd && rg --files -g '!*node_modules*' | head -80 && printf '\n--- package ---\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json

find . -path './node_modules' -prune -o -path './.git' -prune -o -type f -print | sed -n '1,140p'; printf '\n--- highlight references ---\n'; grep -R "initialHighlightedIndex\|defaultHighlightedIndex\|isItemDisabled" --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -n . | head -240

grep -R "getInitial\|initialHighlightedIndex\|defaultHighlightedIndex" --exclude-dir=node_modules -n src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/useSelect src/hooks | head -220; printf '
--- combobox utils ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js; printf '
--- select utils ---
'; sed -n '1,280p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.js; printf '
--- shared utils ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' src/hooks/utils.js

sed -n '260,620p' src/hooks/utils.js; printf '
--- combobox index/reducer ---
'; sed -n '1,300p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js; sed -n '1,300p' src/hooks/useCombobox/reducer.js; printf '
--- select index/reducer ---
'; sed -n '1,280p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js; sed -n '1,300p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js

grep -n "function getNonDisabledIndex\|function getHighlightedIndex\|getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\|export" src/utils.js src/hooks/utils.js | tail -80; sed -n '1,180p' src/utils.js; tail -100 src/hooks/utils.js; printf '
--- select utils props ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.js 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
--- existing disabled/open tests ---
'; sed -n '660,750p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js; sed -n '880,940p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js; sed -n '500,570p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js
